# BAPU

BAPU provides a friendly space for communities. Join us today!

## Welcome to BAPU
A family-friendly space for real connections, safe spaces, and vibrant communities. Join us to find your bubble and connect with friends!

**New Namespace Available!**
Put in your current handle and desired handle and activate it. Fast and easy. No login needed.
[Claim Your New Handle Here](https://bapu.app/claim.html)

## What is BAPU?
BAPU is a welcoming platform designed for everyone. We believe in creating a positive, safe, and engaging environment where you can truly be yourself and connect with people who matter.

## Our Values

*   **Family Friendly:** A safe space for users of all ages to interact and share.
*   **Community First:** Built to support groups, from close friends to large communities.
*   **Easy to Use:** Simple interfaces so you can focus on connecting, not figuring out how things work.
